title: Day Counter Plus
description: Day Counter Plus is a Minecraft mod that displays the current in-game day and time on your screen. It offers customizable options and works on single player and multiplayer servers.
body:
# **Day Counter Plus** - [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=%20Downloads&query=$.formatted&url=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinthuserdownloads.nicolaijesse.workers.dev%2Fastyll%3Fformat%3Dtrue&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&style=flat)](https://modrinth.com/user/astyll)



**Day Counter Plus** displays your Minecraft days and time played in a fancy way on your screen. It is fully customizable and works on singleplayer and multiplayer servers. It runs fast with almost no impact on game performance.  

The cool thing about Day Counter Plus, is that **it works on already existing worlds**! This makes it available to use for Everyone at any time. This feature makes it able to work perfect on multiplayer servers aswell.

You can edit the way everything is displayed to the way you like it, including colors, format, sounds and visibility settings.

With the setting: **"Dynamic Colors"** you can change the color of the display automatically depending on your enviroment! You can see the demonstration [here](/mod/dcp/gallery).


## **Features**
- Shows current in-game day and time.  
- Customizable display style (Action bar and Custom).  
- Play sounds when a new day starts and when you're able to sleep.
- Compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer.  

## **Why Use DCP?**
- Never lose track of your days played.
- Easely know when you can sleep or not.
- You dont have to search the F3 menu anymore.
- Fully customizable to fit your personal style.  
- Lightweight and performance-friendly for any server or world. 

_[Clarity](https://modrinth.com/shader/clarityshader) and [Better HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bhud) were used when making screenshots for the [gallery](/mod/dcp/gallery)_

<details>
<summary>To do list</summary>
-   Update to MC 26.1. very hard ):
</details>

## **Settings**

### **General Tab**
| Setting | Default |
| :--- | :--- |
| Enabled | Yes |
| Enable on Singleplayer | Yes |
| Enable on Multiplayer | Yes |
| Only show on new day | No |
| Show Day | Yes |
| Show Time | Yes |
| Show Text Capitalized | No |
| Time Format | 24h |

### **Placement Tab**
| Setting | Default |
| :--- | :--- |
| Placement Mode | Action Bar |
| Horizontal Alignment | Left |
| Vertical Alignment | Top |
| Time on Separate Line | No |
| Horizontal Offset | 10 |
| Vertical Offset | 10 |

### **Colors Tab**
| Setting | Default |
| :--- | :--- |
| Dynamic Colors | On |
| Darken Separator | On |
| Day Color | `#fff` |
| Time Color | `#fff` |
| Separator Color | `#aaa` |

### **Sounds Tab**
| Setting | Default |
| :--- | :--- |
| Enable New Day Sound | On |
| New Day Sound ID | `minecraft:block.beacon.power_select` |
| Enable Night Sound | On |
| Sleep Sound ID | `minecraft:block.note_block.chime` |
| Enable Thunder Sound | On |
| Thunder Sound ID | `minecraft:entity.lightning_bolt.thunder` |


### **Extra Tab**
| Setting | Default |
| :--- | :--- |
| Show Separator | Yes |
| Separator Character | ` - ` |
| Show Decimals | Commas |
| Play Toggle Visibility Sound | Yes |
